tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Retrieve the text and metadata for a specific reference (e.g., 'Genesis.1.1' or 'Berakhot 2a')

tools.name: search_texts
tools.description: Search the Sefaria library for a query string.

tools.name: get_index
tools.description: Returns metadata for a specific text, such as section names and categories

tools.name: get_toc
tools.description: Returns the table of contents for all texts in the library, grouped by category

tools.name: get_links
tools.description: Returns a list of known connections (commentary, citations, etc.) for a specific text segment

tools.name: get_topics
tools.description: Returns a list of JSON objects containing metadata for topics in the database

tools.name: get_calendars
tools.description: Returns daily learning schedules (Parashat Hashavua, Daf Yomi, etc.) for a specific date

tools.name: get_versions
tools.description: Returns available text versions for a specific reference

tools.name: get_shape
tools.description: Returns the structure and section counts for a specific text reference
